title: Krishna University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Krishna University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Krishna University Result 2026 Out for B.Tech III, V and VII Semester Revaluation (RV) exams on the official website - kru.ac.in on 25-04-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Krishna University result.

content.text: Krishna University has officially declared the Krishna University Result 2026 for B.Tech III, V and VII Semester Revaluation (RV) Net Results for the current academic session. These B.Tech RV results have been published online for students who had applied for revaluation of their earlier semester examination marks, allowing them to check their updated scores. Krishna University Result 2026 has been published online on the official website - kru.ac.in.

Students can check and download their B.Tech III, V and VII Sem RV Net Results by visiting the results section, opening the specific B.Tech RV result link and logging in with their hall ticket or registration details as required on the portal. After viewing the revaluation result, candidates should carefully verify their subject wise marks, total marks and updated result status, and contact the university examination section in case of any discrepancy or doubt.

Krishna University has published the latest B.Tech III, V and VII Semesters RV Net Results under its 2026 examination and revaluation cycle. These revaluation results provide revised marks for students who were not satisfied with their earlier B.Tech semester results and had applied for revaluation within the prescribed time. Students can access the Krishna University Result 2026 for B.Tech RV online through kru.ac.in by navigating to the results category and using the direct B.Tech RV Net Results link.

rows: Krishna University Result 2026 Out - B.Tech III, V & VII Semesters RV Net Results
Online - RV Net Results link on official website
Revaluation (RV) results of B.Tech semester exams

content.text: Krishna University has activated a dedicated direct link for the B.Tech-III V and VII Semesters RV Net Results under the results category on its official website. Through this Krishna University Result 2026 direct link, B.Tech students can immediately check their revaluation results without navigating through multiple menus. By using the link provided below, candidates can open the official B.Tech RV result page and view or download their revised marks for III, V and VII semesters online.

links.label: B.Tech-III V and VII Semesters RV Net Results

sections.heading: How to Download Krishna University Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow the steps below to check Krishna University Result 2026 for B.Tech III, V and VII Semesters RV Net Results in online mode.

items: Visit the official Krishna University website at kru.ac.in.
On the homepage, go to the Examinations or Results section, or directly open the results category page at kru.ac.in/category/results/.
Look for the notification or link titled "B.Tech-III V and VII Semesters RV Net Results".
Click on the B.Tech III, V and VII Semesters RV Net Results link to open the result page.
If prompted, enter your hall ticket or registration number and other required details on the result/login page.
Submit the details to view your B.Tech RV result, showing revised subject wise marks, total marks and updated pass/fail status.
Download or take a printout of the Krishna University Result 2026 RV marksheet and keep it safe for academic reference and future documentation.
In case of any mismatch or error in the displayed result, contact the Krishna University examination branch or your college immediately with relevant proof.

structured_links.label: B.Tech-III V and VII Semesters RV Net Results
